microsim.simulation.component.device.keyboard

Package
Description
microsim.simulation
 
microsim.simulation.component.device.keyboard
 
  • Classes in microsim.simulation.component.device.keyboard used by microsim.simulation
    Class
    Description
    KeyboardDevice
    Implements a keyboard device that returns characters via a status and a data port.
  • Classes in microsim.simulation.component.device.keyboard used by microsim.simulation.component.device.keyboard
    Class
    Description
    KeyboardDevice
    Implements a keyboard device that returns characters via a status and a data port.
    KeyboardSource
    Implements an input source that attaches to a KeyboardDevice to send key events.
